chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1645 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.6464/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.6465/2025 (Ex.A) 4. For orders on CMA No.6466/2025 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 02.10.2025 Mr. Gulshan Ahmed Shujrah, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>>>..<<<<<<< The grievance of the Petitioner is that his Appeal / Review Application is pending before Respondent No.2 / Chairman Complaint Redressal Committee constituted u/s 31 (Mechanism for Redressal of Grievances) of the Sindh Public Procurement Rules, 2010, which have not yet been decided. He further submits that he would be satisfied, if the said committee is directed to decide his Appeal / Review Application, expeditiously in accordance with law. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, learned Additional Advocate General present in Court in connection with other matters waives notice and submits that, if the Appeal / Review Application of the Petitioner is pending, the same will be decided within a shortest time in accordance with the law. Under the circumstances, this Petition is disposed of with direction to Respondent No.2 / Chairman Complaint Redressal Committee to decide the Appeal / Review Application of the Petitioner, if pending, within a period of thirty days in accordance with the law. A copy of this order be provided to learned Addl. AG for correspondence and compliance. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
